Atropa belladonna, also known as deadly nightshade, is a plant in the Solanaceae family. It is a perennial herb with shiny black berries and leaves that have a pointed tip. The health benefits of Atropa belladonna include its antispasmodic and sedative properties, which can be used to treat muscle spasms and insomnia. The bioactive constituents of Atropa belladonna include tropane alkaloids, such as atropine and scopolamine, which have anticholinergic effects.

The most common herbal preparations made with Atropa belladonna include tinctures, extracts, and dried herbs, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions, including insomnia, muscle spasms, and motion sickness.
